title: Reality City Construction
description: A fabric mod added Decoration blocks for City Construction in Minecraft
body:
Reality City Construction

Reality City Construction added some Decoration blocks for City Construction in Minecraft.
After 1.0.2 version, this mod no longer support Forge/NeoForge, You can use this to use Reality City Construction in Forge/NeoForge loader.

In 1.0.2 version, many block textures are refreshed! added culling and remove some unnecessary faces to improve performance.

Features

  • Redstone Sound Player
  • Railings for roads
  • Blind Sidewalk
  • Conveyer belt

Links

Visit our QQ Group to download the latest snapshot build!


Credits

CodeCat: Created, update, and debug this mod.
Yaoxiansen: Built some blocks model for the mod.
